summary: Implementation plan for Adding Fast/Balanced/High quality presets to TronikSlate video generation. Covers 3 quality tiers: Fast (fastest Lightning LoRA profile + profile-defined steps), Balanced (25 steps, no LoRA), High (40 steps, no LoRA). Changes span model_scanner.py (constants), render_engine.py (profile selection logic), state.py (build_video_params), render.ts (passthrough), and VideoExport.tsx (UI selector). Includes manual verification plan.
